chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 320 of 2018 ________________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________________________ For hearing of main petition. 18-12-2018 Mr. Fayaz Ahmed Metlo, Advocate for petitioner. -x-x-x-x- Mr. Mohammad Danish died on 5-10-2017 leaving behind the heirs listed in paragraph 3 of the Petition. It appears from the Deputy Registrar (OS)’s report that all formalities have been complied with. No objections have been received to date from any quarter. All the legal heirs and the two witnesses have also effected their appearance in Court and confirmed the facts of the petition. In view of the foregoing there appears to be no impediment in the issuance of the Letter of Administration and Succession Certificate in respect of the properties listed in the Schedule to the Petition. Let the office do the needful subject to rules. JUDGE
